byNews 3 Staff

LAS VEGAS (KSNV) —Dutch Bros Coffee andSpecial Olympics Nevadaare teaming up to help children across the community.

The two announced a partnership for the "Buck for Kids" Day event, an annual fundraiser that will be held on Friday, Sept. 20.

During the event, Dutch Bros will donate $1 from every drink sold to support Special Olympics Nevada.

Donations will help support the organization's sports, education, athlete leadership training, and health programs for adults and children with intellectual disabilities.

Participating Southern Nevada locations are:

Visitdutchbros.comto learn more.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
